description: Creates a service function within a Resilience Hub service.

ServiceArn.description: The ARN of the parent service.
ServiceArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the parent service.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: Replacement

ServiceFunctionId.markdownDescription:
The server-generated service function ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.description: The name of the service function.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the service function.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_\-]{1,59}$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.description: The description of the service function.
Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the service function.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption

Criticality.description: The criticality of the service function.
Criticality.markdownDescription:
The criticality of the service function.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: PRIMARY | SUPPLEMENTAL  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceCount.description: The number of resources associated with this function.
ResourceCount.markdownDescription:
The number of resources associated with this function.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Source.description: The source of the service function.
Source.markdownDescription:
The source of the service function.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AI_GENERATED | USER  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the service function was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the service function was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the service function was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the service function was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ServiceArn.description: The service ARN to list service functions for.
ServiceArn.markdownDescription:
The service ARN to list service functions for.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

The server-generated service function ID.

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ResourceCount.markdownDescription:
The number of resources associated with this function.

---

Required: No

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Source.markdownDescription:
The source of the service function.

---

Required: No

Allowed Values: AI_GENERATED | USER  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

---
